faqs.question: How do I submit a campaign idea?
faqs.answer: Use the 'Suggest a CTA' option on our contact page. We review every suggestion and may turn it into a live call to action.

faqs.question: How can I get in touch?
faqs.answer: Head to our Contact Us page for general inquiries, volunteer interest, or partnership opportunities.

faqs.question: What is a CTA?
faqs.answer: A CTA (Call To Action) is a campaign asking people to take a specific action — like sending a pre-written email to decision-makers — to help animals.

faqs.question: How does the one-click email work?
faqs.answer: When you click a CTA email link, it opens your default email app with the recipients, subject, and body already filled in. Just hit send.
